zh.lifeSummary: Richard Cheyne是Sir Robert de Cheyne的兒子，於1353年4月12日出生在英國肯特易亞斯丘其。他於大約1380年與Margaret de Cralle在英國英格蘭素可瓦布萊頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1392年在他的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國肯特易亞斯丘其哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Cheyne是Sir Robert de Cheyne的儿子，于1353年4月12日出生在英国肯特易亞斯丘其。他于大约1380年与Margaret de Cralle在英国英格兰素可瓦布萊頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1392年在他的家乡享年39岁，埋葬在英国肯特易亞斯丘其哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Cheyne was born on 12 April 1353, in Eastchurch, Kent, England as the son of Sir Robert de Cheyne. He married Margaret de Cralle about 1380, in Warbleton, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1392, in his hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, England.

fr.All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, En: All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Richard Cheyne est né le 12 avril 1353, à Eastchurch, Kent, Angleterre, fils de Sir Robert de Cheyne. Il a épousé Margaret de Cralle environ 1380, à Warbleton, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1392, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, Angleterre.

de.All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, En: All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, England
de.lifeSummary: Richard Cheyne wurde am 12. April 1353 in Eastchurch, Kent, England, als Sohn von Sir Robert de Cheyne geboren. Er hat um 1380 in Warbleton, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Cralle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1392 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Cheyne è nato il il 12 aprile 1353 nel Eastchurch, Kent, England come figlio di Sir Robert de Cheyne. Lui sposato Margaret de Cralle circa 1380, nel Warbleton, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1392, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Cheyneは1353年4月12日にイギリスケントエアストチャーチでSir Robert de Cheyneの息子として生まれた。約1380年にイギリスイギリススセックスワーブレトンでMargaret de Cralleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1392年に故郷で39歳で死去し，イギリスケントエアストチャーチアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, En: 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Cheyne(은)는 1353년 4월 12일 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치에서 Sir Robert de Cheyne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 워블레턴에서 Margaret de Cralle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1392년 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치 앨 세인츠' 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, En: All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Richard Cheyne nasceu em 12 de abril de 1353, em Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra filho de Sir Robert de Cheyne. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Cralle aproximadamente 1380, em Warbleton, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1392, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, En: алл сеинц' чурч, эасчурч, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Richard Cheyne родился 12 апреля 1353 г. в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия. Его отца звали Sir Robert de Cheyne. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Cralle около 1380 г. в местности варблетон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1392 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц' чурч, эасчурч, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret de Cralle aproximadamente 1380, en Warbleton, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1392, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en All Saints' Church, Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra.
